top3.sql:
WITH carcinogenic_molecules AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
),
chlorine_molecules AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id
    FROM atom
    WHERE element = 'Cl'
),
total_carcinogenic AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM carcinogenic_molecules
),
chlorine_carcinogenic AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS chlorine_count
    FROM carcinogenic_molecules cm
    INNER JOIN chlorine_molecules cl ON cm.molecule_id = cl.molecule_id
)
SELECT 
    CAST(c...

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN ('Cl');
